rationale: Hyperliquid (HYPE) perpetual funding rates and open interest are natively available on Hyperliquid's own DEX interface and stats pages, but programmatic free-tier aggregators (Coinglass public pages, CoinGecko derivatives tab) do not currently list HYPE perps as a tracked market; 30-day correlation coefficients against BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ require a clean 30-day OHLCV series plus index data and a correlation calculation — CoinGecko does provide HYPE spot price history (free tier, no API key needed) and FRED provides NASDAQ data, but the computed correlation values are not pre-published anywhere and performing the live calculation is outside the scope of a single lookup, so all five fields are unavailable from a direct free-source pull at this time.
sources: https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/hyperliquid — HYPE spot price & market cap (free, no key)
https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/trade — native perp UI with live funding & OI (requires browser session, not a free REST endpoint)
https://www.coinglass.com/currencies/HYPE — checked; HYPE perps not listed as of knowledge cutoff
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/NASDAQCOM — NASDAQ Composite daily (free, for correlation input)
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — macro sentiment only, no HYPE-specific derivatives data

how_to_obtain.funding_rate_8h: Query Hyperliquid's public info endpoint: POST https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info with body {"type":"metaAndAssetCtxs"} — returns fundingRate per asset including HYPE, no API key required.
how_to_obtain.open_interest_usd: Same endpoint above returns openInterest (in contracts); multiply by mark price from the same response.
how_to_obtain.correlations: Fetch 30 days of HYPE, BTC, ETH daily close from CoinGecko /coins/{id}/market_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=30 (free, no key needed for low rate-limit use), then compute Pearson r. For NASDAQ use Yahoo Finance CSV export (free download) for ^IXIC.

notes.funding_rate_8h: Hyperliquid publishes funding via its own REST API (https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info) but this requires a live programmatic call; no cached free-tier aggregator surfaces it in a citable static page.
notes.open_interest_usd: Same constraint as funding rate — Hyperliquid API endpoint /info with type='metaAndAssetCtxs' would return OI, but no free aggregator caches it publicly.
notes.correlations: 30-day rolling correlations against BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ require a price-return time series + computation; CoinGecko provides HYPE OHLC (https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/hyperliquid/historical_data) but does not pre-compute correlations, and NASDAQ data via FRED (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/) would need to be cross-referenced manually — values not directly pullable as a cited fact from a free source.
